hooks.command: file="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; if [[ "$file" == *".py" && "$file" == *"apps/api-gateway"* ]]; then echo "[提示] Python后端文件已修改，如有必要运行: cd ~/Desktop/zhilian-os && pytest apps/api-gateway/tests/ -q"; fi; if [[ "$file" == *".py" && "$file" == *"packages/agents"* ]]; then echo "[提示] Agent文件已修改，记得在各agent目录单独运行pytest (见L001)"; fi
